name: Baked Swiss Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from the steak and cut into serving pieces.
2. Pound flour onto both sides of the steak.
3. Heat oil or shortening in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Brown the steak on both sides, seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Place the steak in a Pyrex dish and cover with onion slices.
6. In the same skillet, heat the tomatoes until they are heated through and any brown bits from the bottom of the skillet have been loosened.
7. Add Worcestershire sauce and season the mixture with additional salt and pepper as desired.
8. Pour the tomato-Worcestershire sauce mixture over the steak in the Pyrex dish.
9. Cover the dish with a lid or foil and bake at 350°F for 2 to 2-1/2 hours, or until the steak is fork-tender.
Serve over rice, buttered noodles, or mashed potatoes.
